창세기 49:1.content: Jacob called to his sons, and said: “Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you that which will happen to you in the days to come.

창세기 49:2.content: Assemble yourselves, and hear, you sons of Jacob. Listen to Israel, your father.

창세기 49:3.content: “Reuben, you are my firstborn, my might, and the beginning of my strength; excelling in dignity, and excelling in power.

창세기 49:4.content: Boiling over like water, you shall not excel; because you went up to your father’s bed, then defiled it. He went up to my couch.

창세기 49:5.content: “Simeon and Levi are brothers. Their swords are weapons of violence.

창세기 49:6.content: My soul, don’t come into their council. My glory, don’t be united to their assembly; for in their anger they killed men. In their self-will they hamstrung cattle.

창세기 49:7.content: Cursed be their anger, for it was fierce; and their wrath, for it was cruel. I will divide them in Jacob, and scatter them in Israel.

창세기 49:8.content: “Judah, your brothers will praise you. Your hand will be on the neck of your enemies. Your father’s sons will bow down before you.

창세기 49:9.content: Judah is a lion’s cub. From the prey, my son, you have gone up. He stooped down, he crouched as a lion, as a lioness. Who will rouse him up?

창세기 49:10.content: The scepter will not depart from Judah, nor the ruler’s staff from between his feet, until he comes to whom it belongs. To him will the obedience of the peoples be.

창세기 49:11.content: Binding his foal to the vine, his donkey’s colt to the choice vine; he has washed his garments in wine, his robes in the blood of grapes.

창세기 49:12.content: His eyes will be red with wine, his teeth white with milk.

창세기 49:13.content: “Zebulun will dwell at the haven of the sea. He will be for a haven of ships. His border will be on Sidon.

창세기 49:14.content: “Issachar is a strong donkey, lying down between the saddlebags.

창세기 49:15.content: He saw a resting place, that it was good, the land, that it was pleasant. He bows his shoulder to the burden, and becomes a servant doing forced labor.

창세기 49:16.content: “Dan will judge his people, as one of the tribes of Israel.

창세기 49:17.content: Dan will be a serpent on the trail, an adder in the path, that bites the horse’s heels, so that his rider falls backward.

창세기 49:18.content: I have waited for your salvation, Yahweh.

창세기 49:19.content: “A troop will press on Gad, but he will press on their heel.

창세기 49:20.content: “Asher’s food will be rich. He will produce royal dainties.

창세기 49:21.content: “Naphtali is a doe set free, who bears beautiful fawns.

창세기 49:22.content: “Joseph is a fruitful vine, a fruitful vine by a spring. His branches run over the wall.

창세기 49:23.content: The archers have severely grieved him, shot at him, and persecuted him:

창세기 49:24.content: But his bow remained strong. The arms of his hands were made strong, by the hands of the Mighty One of Jacob, (from there is the shepherd, the stone of Israel),

창세기 49:25.content: even by the God of your father, who will help you, by the Almighty, who will bless you, with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that lies below, blessings of the breasts, and of the womb.

창세기 49:26.content: The blessings of your father have prevailed above the blessings of your ancestors, above the boundaries of the ancient hills. They will be on the head of Joseph, on the crown of the head of him who is separated from his brothers.

창세기 49:27.content: “Benjamin is a ravenous wolf. In the morning he will devour the prey. At evening he will divide the plunder.”

창세기 49:28.content: All these are the twelve tribes of Israel, and this is what their father spoke to them, and blessed them. He blessed everyone according to his own blessing.

창세기 49:29.content: He instructed them, and said to them, “I am to be gathered to my people. Bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of Ephron the Hittite,

창세기 49:30.content: in the cave that is in the field of Machpelah, which is before Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field from Ephron the Hittite as a burial place.

창세기 49:31.content: There they buried Abraham and Sarah, his wife. There they buried Isaac and Rebekah, his wife, and there I buried Leah:

창세기 49:32.content: the field and the cave that is therein, which was purchased from the children of Heth.”

창세기 49:33.content: When Jacob finished charging his sons, he gathered up his feet into the bed, breathed his last breath, and was gathered to his people.
